results.title: Samsung C&T Wins 2.1 Trillion Won Apgujeong District 4 Redevelopment Contract
results.description: Samsung C&T has been selected as the contractor for Seoul's Apgujeong District 4 redevelopment project, securing the 2.1154 trillion won deal with an 87.4% approval rate as the sole bidder.

results.title: Critical mineral finds beneath 350-year-old Assam temple spark economic hopes
results.description: Locals around Goalpara’s historic Tukreswari Temple believe the mineral discovery could dramatically reshape the district’s economic future
